"terrorist" was removed from the first sentence. The reason is obvious: [[Al-Qaeda]] is designated as a terrorist group by many more countries and international organizations, including [[NATO]] and [[United Nations Security Council]], and still it is not introduced as a terrorist organization in the first sentence of it's wikpedia entry. Please do not remove this without addressing the issue raised by me, for example by changing the Al-Qaeda entry.
